common.backendUnreachable: Backend is unreachable. Changes will not save until the connection is restored.

auth.createAccountSubtitle: Set up your account to start tracking
auth.featurePortfolioDesc: Real-time investment monitoring with live prices
auth.featureBudgetDesc: Monthly income & expense analysis with trends
auth.featureSecureDesc: Self-hosted, your data stays on your server
auth.footer: Open source  ·  Self-hosted  ·  Your data, your server
auth.totpSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
auth.verifySuccessBody: You can now use every feature of FinTrack Pro.
auth.unverifiedBanner: Confirm your email address ({{email}}) to unlock email alerts.
auth.resetRequestBody: Enter your email. If we know it, we will send a reset link.
auth.resetRequestSent: If that email exists, a reset link is on its way.
auth.resetConfirmBody: Pick a new password. The link expires after one use.
auth.resetSuccessBody: You can log in with your new password.

dashboard.portfolioPerformanceEmpty: Add investments to see performance charts
dashboard.upcomingBillsDesc: Add recurring bills to track due dates and payments
dashboard.topHoldingsDesc: Your best performing assets will appear here
dashboard.netWorthTrendEmpty: Snapshots build up daily; come back tomorrow to see the trend line.
dashboard.incomeExpenseTrendEmpty: Capture monthly snapshots from the Budget page to fill this chart.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: Track your investments and monitor performance
portfolio.noPortfoliosDesc: Create your first portfolio to start tracking investments. Supports stocks, crypto, BES funds, and forex.
portfolio.dialogDescription: Set up a new portfolio to organize your investments.

holdings.emptyDesc: Add the assets you currently own to track their value, average cost, and profit over time.
holdings.dialogDescription: Pick an asset and enter the quantity and average cost you paid for it.
holdings.quantityError: Quantity must be greater than zero
holdings.avgCostError: Average cost must be a positive number
holdings.allocationHint: Weight of each asset by current value
holdings.historyHint: Daily portfolio valuation captured each midnight
holdings.historyEmpty: Not enough history yet. Snapshots start stacking up once the nightly capture has run a few times.

allocation.title: Target allocation
allocation.description: Set ideal weights per asset class. The bar shows how far each class has drifted from its target.
allocation.sumError: Targets must add up to 100% (current total: {{sum}}%).
allocation.emptyHint: Define per-class weights to surface rebalance drift automatically.
allocation.overweightHint: Overweight by {{amount}} in {{type}} — candidate to trim.
allocation.underweightHint: Underweight by {{amount}} in {{type}} — candidate to top up.

networth.title: Net worth timeline
networth.subtitle: Combined portfolio value with event annotations
networth.needSnapshots: At least two daily snapshots needed to draw a trend line.
networth.label: Label
networth.labelPlaceholder: e.g. Bought first apartment, bonus payout, savings milestone
networth.notePlaceholder: Context you will want to remember later (optional)

savings.title: Savings goals
savings.subtitle: Named targets with rolling 90-day pace projection
savings.empty: Set a goal to start tracking progress -- link a portfolio for live valuation, or log contributions manually.
savings.name: Name
savings.namePlaceholder: e.g. Emergency fund, House down payment
savings.linkedPortfolioHint: When linked, current value comes from live holdings. Otherwise it sums contributions.
savings.notesPlaceholder: Why this goal matters, or how you intend to fund it

debt.title: Debt tracker
debt.subtitle: Amortization and payoff projection per liability
debt.empty: Track a mortgage, auto loan, or credit card -- we project payoff dates from your actual payments.
debt.name: Name

fire.title: FIRE calculator
fire.subtitle: Time-to-independence from your savings rate and live net worth
fire.targetHint: 25x annual expenses at a {{rate}} safe withdrawal rate
fire.financiallyFreeHint: Net worth already covers your annual expenses at this SWR.
fire.unreachableHint: Savings rate alone won't close the gap -- increase contributions or the expected return.
fire.needMoreData_one: Log {{count}} more month of income & expenses for a reliable projection.
fire.needMoreData_other: Log {{count}} more months of income & expenses for a reliable projection.

tag.sectionDescription: Label transactions with reusable tags for faster filtering.
tag.empty: No tags yet. Create one above to start grouping transactions.

categoryRules.sectionDescription: When a transaction description contains the pattern, assign the matched category automatically.
categoryRules.empty: No rules yet. Add a pattern above to start auto-categorizing.

risk.title: Risk profile
risk.waiting_one: Collecting daily snapshots -- {{count}} more day needed before risk metrics become meaningful.
risk.waiting_other: Collecting daily snapshots -- {{count}} more days needed before risk metrics become meaningful.
risk.sharpeBad: Losing ground versus the risk-free rate

budget.title: Budget
budget.emptyDesc: Add your first income or expense to start tracking your monthly budget.
budget.noCategories: No categories yet. You can add them in Settings.
budget.monthlyLogHint: Historical record of captured month-end snapshots
budget.noSnapshots: No snapshots yet. Capture the current month to start your log.
budget.manageCategoryBudgetsHint: Set a monthly target per category. Toggle rollover to carry unspent amounts into the next month.
budget.noExpenseCategories: No expense categories yet. Create them from Settings.

bills.title: Bills
bills.description: Track recurring bills and payment status
bills.emptyDesc: Add your recurring bills to track due dates, payments, and get reminders before they are due.

audit.title: Subscription audit
audit.subtitle: Recurring charges you may have forgotten about
audit.empty: No stale subscriptions. Everything in active rotation.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account and application preferences
settings.localizationDesc: Currency, language, and date format preferences
settings.notificationsSoon: Notification settings will be available soon.
settings.passwordDescription: Update the password used to sign in.
settings.passwordUnchanged: New password must differ from the current one.
settings.passwordChangedSigningOut: Password updated. Signing you out of other sessions.
settings.sessionsDescription: Every device that is signed in. Revoke anything you do not recognise.
settings.importDescription: Bring transactions from your legacy Yatirim_Takip spreadsheet.
settings.importDesc: Pick a .xlsx export with the YATIRIM_LOG sheet. Preview validates rows; Run writes them to your portfolios. Duplicates are skipped automatically.
settings.backupDescription: Download a full JSON snapshot of your data, or upload a previous snapshot to replace everything.
settings.backupDesc: The export contains every portfolio, transaction, tag, rule, bill, goal, and debt you own. Import wipes your current data and writes the uploaded snapshot in its place.
settings.backupImportConfirmTitle: This will replace all your data
settings.backupImportConfirmBody: {{name}} will overwrite every portfolio, transaction, tag, bill, goal, and debt currently on this account. This cannot be undone.
settings.totpDescription: Adds a time-based 6-digit code from an authenticator app on top of your password.
settings.totpScanHint: Scan with Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, or any TOTP app. Or paste the key manually.
settings.totpConfirmCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your app
settings.totpDisableHint: Enter your password to turn off 2FA.

prices.title: Asset Prices
prices.description: Live unit prices the system uses when valuing your holdings. Refresh individually or all at once.
prices.addFundDescription: Search the full TEFAS catalog by code or name and import funds on demand.
prices.addFundSearchPlaceholder: Search by code or name (e.g. AFT, garanti)
prices.addFundMinChars: Type at least 2 characters to search.
prices.noFavorites: No starred assets yet. Tap a star on any row to track it here.

assetDetail.historyEmpty: No recorded price points yet. History builds up as prices refresh.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Trends across your budget and investments, computed from captured snapshots.
analytics.expenseGrowthEmpty: Needs at least two captured months
analytics.portfolioCagrEmpty: Needs at least two portfolio snapshots
analytics.savingsRateTrendHint: Month-over-month savings rate from captured monthly logs.
analytics.incomeExpenseHint: Each bar is a captured monthly snapshot.
analytics.netWorthTrendHint: Aggregated value and cost basis across every portfolio.
analytics.emptyBudgetDesc: Capture at least two monthly snapshots from the Budget page to see trends.
analytics.emptyPortfolioDesc: Portfolio snapshots are captured daily. Come back tomorrow to see trends.

transactions.title: Transaction log
transactions.description: Every buy, sell, deposit, and rebalance recorded for this portfolio.
transactions.dialogDescription: Log an investment action. Buys and sells automatically update the related holding.
transactions.quantityError: Quantity must be a positive number.
transactions.priceError: Unit price must be zero or greater.
transactions.feeError: Fee must be zero or greater.
transactions.emptyDesc: Record your first buy, sell, or deposit to build your audit trail.
transactions.confirmDelete: Delete this transaction? The related holding will not be adjusted.

budgetRules.title: Spending limits
budgetRules.description: Get an alert when a category exceeds its monthly cap.

recurring.title: Recurring transactions
recurring.description: Auto-book predictable income and expenses (salary, rent, subscriptions) every month.
recurring.empty: No recurring templates yet. Add one to automate monthly entries.
recurring.dayOfMonthHint: Values above the month length fall back to the last day (e.g. 31 becomes 28/29 in February).

alerts.title: Price Alerts
alerts.description: Get notified when an asset crosses a price threshold.
alerts.emptyDescription: Set a threshold and we will let you know the moment an asset crosses it.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.description: Recent security-relevant events for this account

palette.title: Command palette
palette.description: Jump to any page, portfolio, or bill
palette.emptyHint: Try a page name, portfolio, or bill
